document_title: AI Health Report Analysis & Health Consultant

INVALID_INVITE_CODE: Invalid invitation code. Please contact administrator.
QUOTA_EXHAUSTED: The quota for this invitation code has been exhausted.

NETWORK_ERROR: Analysis failed. Please check your backend connection.
UNKNOWN_ERROR: Unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
modal_body:
Security & Privacy Statement

This system achieves an enterprise-grade protection standard regarding the privacy and security of your uploaded health check reports and files. The specific security protection mechanisms are summarized in the following four points:

1. Zero Local Retention
  • No Disk Writing: All uploaded reports and images are streamed and read directly in the application server's memory (RAM).
  • Immediate Garbage Collection: The file data in memory is released immediately after the API completes processing and returns analysis results. No customer files are stored on the server's local disk, completely eliminating data theft risk even if the server is compromised.
2. End-to-End Encryption in Transit
  • Client to Backend: File transfers between browser and WebApp backend are strictly encrypted using high-strength HTTPS (TLS 1.2 / TLS 1.3).
  • Backend to Cloud: SDK requests between the WebApp and Google Cloud Platform (GCP) are transmitted through secure channels encrypted by Google to prevent man-in-the-middle (MITM) attacks or eavesdropping.
3. PII-Free Logging
  • No Personal Sensitive Info: System logs are designed solely for usage statistics and debugging. No physiological values, diagnosis results, or personal identifiers (e.g., name, national ID) are collected or logged.
  • Log Scope: Only timestamps, de-identified invite codes, filenames, and file sizes are recorded for quota management.
4. Enterprise Google Cloud Privacy Commitment
  • No Model Training Risks: The Vertex AI Gemini API used belongs to Google Cloud enterprise services. Under GCP terms of service, customer inputs and analysis data are never used by Google to train or fine-tune public base models.
  • Cloud Security Compliance: Data is processed inside Google Cloud infrastructure controlled by GCP security mechanisms, adhering to international compliance standards (e.g., ISO 27001, SOC 2/3, and HIPAA-ready architecture).
